Title: Relates to establishing the crime of obstruction of governmental duties at the scene of a crime
Summary: Relates to establishing the crime of obstruction of governmental duties at the scene of a crime wherein a person acts under the color of law to prevent a police officer from accessing the scene of a crime or any evidence at the scene of a crime.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to establishing the crime of obstruction of governmental duties at the scene of a crime
